title: Public Companions
subtitle: Enterprise-grade agents that safely serve strangers — narrow but deep: Q&A and knowledge-base retrieval only, all dangerous capabilities off.

trust.locked: Terminal / file / computer / browser and other risky powers are off

card.channelsPending: Channel deployment — backend integration in progress

empty.title: No public companions yet
empty.desc: Create a public companion, bind public knowledge bases and a service policy, and let it safely serve strangers.

create.title: Create public companion
create.desc: Give your public-facing agent a name. After it's created you can configure its voice, model, knowledge bases and service policy on its own management page.

overview.statusDesc: When enabled, this companion starts serving strangers; when disabled, all public service is paused.
overview.modelDesc: The model this companion answers strangers with — the prerequisite for every reply. Pick it here; changes take effect immediately.
overview.modelDefaultHint: With no model of its own, it answers using the system default model; pin a specific model here for consistent, reliable replies.
overview.dangerDesc: Permanently delete this public companion and its audit records. This cannot be undone.
overview.deleteBody: Deleting removes this companion's configuration and audit records permanently and cannot be undone. The bound knowledge bases themselves are not deleted.

identity.title: Identity & Voice
identity.desc: Set the companion's name, opening greeting, and the tone it should use when answering strangers.
identity.nameHint: The name shown internally and to visitors.
identity.greetingHint: The first welcome message a visitor sees when opening a conversation.
identity.greetingPlaceholder: e.g. Hi! I'm the website support assistant — happy to help with any product questions.
identity.toneHint: How it should speak (professional / friendly / concise…).
identity.tonePlaceholder: e.g. Always polite, professional and concise; when unsure, say so honestly and offer to collect contact details.
identity.modelHint: The model this companion uses to answer strangers.

knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.desc: Choose the platform knowledge bases this companion may retrieve from; it will only cite content from these bases when answering strangers.
knowledge.noBases: No knowledge bases yet — create one under Knowledge first.
knowledge.groundedHint: When on, the companion answers strictly from the bound knowledge bases; if it can't find grounding it says so explicitly instead of improvising. Best for high-compliance public scenarios.

policy.title: Service Policy
policy.desc: Define the companion's business scope, off-limits topics and compliance phrasing; it will follow these rules strictly when serving strangers.
policy.template:
Business scope:
- Only answer questions related to our company's products / services.

Off-limits topics:
- Do not discuss price negotiation, internal information, competitor comparisons, or politics / religion and other sensitive topics.

Compliance phrasing:
- When unsure, guide the user to contact a human agent; never fabricate answers.
- For personal privacy / account operations, ask the user to verify their identity through official channels.
policy.placeholder: Write the service policy this companion must follow (business scope / off-limits topics / compliance phrasing). Click "Insert template" in the top-right to get started.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.desc: A trail of this companion's public activity (conversations and configuration changes), newest first.
audit.retentionDesc: Set how many days of audit records to keep, and clear older history on demand.
audit.cleanupBody: This permanently deletes audit records older than {{n}} days and cannot be undone.

channels.title: Channels
channels.desc: Connect IM channel bots for this public companion: enter the bot credentials, enable and bind it, and strangers on that channel are served automatically and safely. Each channel bot serves a single object.
channels.bindConfirm: Once bound, this bot is served by "{{name}}" and the channel's active sessions are reset.
channels.unbindConfirm: Once unbound, this bot is no longer served by this public companion and the channel's active sessions are reset.
channels.bindSuccess: Now served by "{{name}}" — sessions on this channel were reset
channels.modelFollowsAgent: This bot uses the public companion's chat model — configure it on the Overview tab
channels.footerHint: After you connect and bind a bot for a platform, strangers on that channel will be served by this public companion. The bot uses this companion's chat model.
